remediation: A bug-only repo (no .doti/cycle-state.json) has no coded sanctioned commit path for the release-doc fix the release-documentation gate demands. Root: (1) 'doti cycle commit' does NOT exist (RunnerCommandFactory.Cycle.cs:8-17 = stamp/status/check/refresh-plan/refresh/review-rebind; the standalone commit path CycleService.Commit.cs was deleted in cycle 006, folded into transition-only machinery; the operator's belief traces to a stale spec docs/specs/cycle-completion-and-repo-update.md:389,403 never pruned). (2) hx doti bug assess/fix/test write only JSON under .doti/bugs/, never commit (BugCycleService.cs). (3) hx release (LocalReleaseService.cs) has no commit logic. So a bug-only repo has NEITHER a workflow-transition NOR a release commit path for operator content; 033 widened the gate's evaluation but not any commit path. FIX (option b): new BugReleaseDocCommit.Commit in Hx.Doti.Core.Bug modeled on DotiReconcileCommit -- git work tree required, stage ONLY README.md + CHANGELOG.md (never git add -A), sanctioned commit (PrecommitGuard.SentinelEnvVar=1) with the 032 retry-on-lock, GATED on BugCycleService.ReleaseReadyBugMembers >=1 included member (fail-closed, never a generic backdoor), idempotent no-op when nothing staged. Wire a new CLI verb 'hx doti bug release-docs' (RunnerCommandFactory.Doti.cs AddDotiBug + RunnerCommands.Bug.cs + a new errorcode). Document the step in the doti-bug templates (invoke the verb, not a manual DOTI_SANCTIONED_COMMIT=1). Prune the stale doti-cycle-commit reference in cycle-completion-and-repo-update.md. NO change to the insurance hook / PrecommitGuard / GetReleaseTrain / ReleaseDocumentationInspector. Tests: happy-path (valid member + staged README/CHANGELOG -> commit exactly those two), fail-closed (no member -> refuse before git mutation), hook-still-blocks-bare-commit, idempotent no-op, existing BugOnlyReleasePathTests + ReleaseDocumentationProofTests unchanged.
summary: A bug-only repo has no coded sanctioned commit path for the release-doc fix the release-documentation gate demands -- 'doti cycle commit' does not exist (stale-spec mirage), hx doti bug/hx release do not commit operator content, and 033 widened the gate's evaluation but not the commit path. Fix: a new sanctioned 'hx doti bug release-docs' committing exactly README+CHANGELOG, gated on a valid bug release-train member.
